title: woof story producer result
description: Written by the primary story producer before clean exit (exit 0). The graph reads this and branches on outcome. outcome=staged_for_verification means the diff is staged and ready for woof check stage-5; outcome=aborted_with_position means the producer decided to halt and has authored position prose; outcome=empty_diff means no code changes were made.

epic_id.description: Tracker-assigned epic identifier. Same value as E<N>.

outcome.description: staged_for_verification: diff is staged; proceed to woof check stage-5. aborted_with_position: producer halted; graph writes gate from position prose. empty_diff: no changes; graph writes gate for operator confirmation.

commit_body.description: Optional multi-line commit body. Used by the graph when constructing the git commit message. Required for staged_for_verification outcome.

commit_subject.description: Optional one-line conventional commit subject authored by the story producer from the actual work performed. If absent, the graph falls back to a generic story-derived subject.

position.description: Prose position authored by the producer explaining why it halted. Required for aborted_with_position and empty_diff outcomes. The graph passes this verbatim to woof gate write.
